abilities.name: Thread Cut
abilities.description: Nyx marks the killer. If they continue chasing the same target beyond a short grace period, they are slowed and briefly unable to use abilities.

abilities.name: Intercept
abilities.description: Nyx braces herself. While active, the next hit taken from the killer is reduced and staggers them briefly.

abilities.name: Tether Break
abilities.description: Nyx disrupts the killer’s focus, forcing them to briefly lose lock on their current target and preventing immediate re-engagement.

abilities.name: Oath Anchor
abilities.description: Nyx binds herself to an ally, taking a portion of the damage they receive. Releasing the link with precise timing negates the most recent redirected damage.
